figures.caption: Figure 1: Common table formats. These tables were obtained from the following XML documents: a) 10.1016/j.smallrumres.2018.01.001, b) 10.1016/j.xphs.2017.03.032, c) 10.1016/j.vetpar.2015.02.013, d) 10.1016/j.xphs.2017.03.032.
